description_long: This is a modern self-checkout cash register station, typically found in supermarkets or large retail stores. It features a dual-surface design with a main checkout area and a secondary bagging or preparation area, both with smooth, metallic-looking surfaces. A prominent touchscreen display is mounted on a stand above the central section, likely for customer interaction and payment processing. The unit is primarily constructed from metal and plastic, with dark blue accent bands and black trim along the edges. The central section includes a recessed area, possibly for a scanner or payment terminal, and the overall build is robust and functional. The design suggests integrated compartments for cash handling and possibly a concealed cash drawer and receipt printer.
description: A modern, dual-surface self-checkout cash register station with a touchscreen display, metallic body, and dark blue accents. It features a robust, functional design with integrated compartments and a central interactive area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen display, central recessed area, and both the main and secondary surfaces with blue accent bands.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the touchscreen, the main checkout surface, and the depth of the bagging area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the touchscreen, the full width of the station, and the central compartment.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the back of the unit, the display stand, and the overall structure of the cash register.
